Strategic Alliance

Golden Triangle Ecosystem

Integrating "Top-tier Development, Local Advisory, High-Yield Finance" to build a safe, compliant, and high-return cross-border investment path.

Crestline Advisory

Local SA advisory firm specializing in residency, property investment, and banking services, safeguarding your assets.

Learn More

CanvasCrest Properties

Premier SA developer creating high-quality Gated Communities with scarce, high-appreciation potential.

Learn More
High Yield

8% Floating Yield

Standard Bank Money Market

Not just property, but wealth management. Your idle funds earn ~8% annual yield in a dedicated account in your name.

  • Account in investor's name, absolute safety
  • Interest fully belongs to you

Supporting Ecosystem

PropTech Solution

Not Just Investment, But Your
24/7 Digital Asset Butler

Traditional overseas investment suffers from lack of transparency and management difficulties. DingYao Advisory introduces an exclusive digital fulfillment system, providing real-time, transparent asset monitoring for APAC investors.

Transparent Fulfillment

From construction to handover, combined with drone footage and inspection reports, monitor progress via the cloud anytime.

Cashflow & Tax Dashboard

Integrate rental income, property expenses, and tax estimations. Generate annual asset reports with one click.

Rent Received

+ ZAR 25,000

Invest in Options, Not Just Property

As Asia faces high competition, we open a second battlefield for you.
Let assets work for you, and let your family enjoy a world-class quality of life.
